acceptance_criteria.text: Create troubleshooting docs for install, SmartScreen, code signing status, app launch, content loading, backup restore, corrupted state, and reset/recovery.
Document where learner data lives on each supported platform and how to preserve, reset, or move it.
Document how to collect local diagnostics according to the stance from 225.
Add mobile-specific support sections once 217/218 establish Android/iOS behavior.
Link support docs from README and release notes where users naturally look during install or recovery.
